steps.title: Create ASP.NET Core project in Visual Studio
steps.vsHint:
[Адаптация: KodShopWeb, PU, магазин]
[Задание: PU, магазин]
Recommended: ASP.NET Core Web App (Model-View-Controller), .NET 8.
Also works: Empty template — ExamCoach will create Models, Controllers, Views folders.
Any project name (not only KodShopWeb).
steps.terminal:
dotnet new mvc -n KodShopWeb -f net8.0 -o KodShopWeb
:: or empty: dotnet new web -n MyShop -f net8.0 -o MyShop

steps.title: Install NuGet packages (version 8.x for .NET 8)
steps.vsHint:
[Адаптация: KodShopWeb, PU, магазин]
[Задание: PU, магазин]
Right click project -> Manage NuGet Packages:
- Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Sqlite 8.0.11
- Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design 8.0.11
- ClosedXML 0.105.0

Or Package Manager Console:
steps.terminal:
Install-Package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Sqlite -Version 8.0.11
Install-Package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design -Version 8.0.11
Install-Package ClosedXML -Version 0.105.0

steps.title: Create folder structure
steps.vsHint:
[Адаптация: KodShopWeb, PU, магазин]
[Задание: PU, магазин]
Add folders: Models, Data, Services, ViewModels, Docs.
Add wwwroot/images/products.
Copy picture.png from KOD resources to wwwroot/images/.

steps.title: ER-diagram (PDF)
steps.vsHint:
[Адаптация: KodShopWeb, PU, магазин]
[Задание: PU, магазин]
Open Docs/ER-Diagram.html in browser → Print → Save as PDF → Docs/ER-Diagram.pdf.
Attach ER-Diagram.pdf to exam materials (module 1 requirement).

steps.title: appsettings.json
steps.vsHint:
appsettings.json — "Variant": "PU" (книги).
Add ConnectionStrings and Shop section.

steps.title: KodShopWeb.csproj
steps.code:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Remove="ExamCoach/**" />
    <Content Remove="ExamCoach/**" />
    <None Remove="ExamCoach/**" />
    <EmbeddedResource Remove="ExamCoach/**" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="ClosedXML" Version="0.105.0" />
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design" Version="8.0.11">
      <PrivateAssets>all</PrivateAssets>
      <IncludeAssets>runtime; build; native; contentfiles; analyzers; buildtransitive</IncludeAssets>
    </PackageReference>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Sqlite" Version="8.0.11" />
  </ItemGroup>

</Project>

steps.title: Docs/ER-Diagram.html
steps.vsHint: ER-diagram source; export to Docs/ER-Diagram.pdf for exam.
steps.code:
ER-диаграмма базы данных KodShopWeb

Для сдачи: откройте этот файл в браузере → Печать → «Сохранить как PDF» → Docs/ER-Diagram.pdf

AppUser

  • Id (PK)
  • FullName
  • Login
  • Password
  • Role
  • Email

Category

  • Id (PK)
  • Name

Manufacturer

  • Id (PK)
  • Name

Supplier

  • Id (PK)
  • Name

Product

  • Id (PK)
  • Article
  • Name, Description
  • Price, Unit
  • QuantityOnStock
  • Discount, ImagePath
  • CategoryId (FK)
  • ManufacturerId (FK)
  • SupplierId (FK)

PickupPoint

  • Id (PK)
  • Address

Order

  • Id (PK)
  • Article
  • Status
  • OrderDate
  • DeliveryDate
  • PickupCode
  • PickupPointId (FK)
  • ClientId (FK → AppUser)

OrderItem

  • Id (PK)
  • OrderId (FK)
  • ProductId (FK)
  • Quantity

Связи

  • Category 1 — N Product
  • Manufacturer 1 — N Product
  • Supplier 1 — N Product
  • PickupPoint 1 — N Order
  • AppUser (Client) 1 — N Order (необязательная)
  • Order 1 — N OrderItem
  • Product 1 — N OrderItem
